steps.title: Spot the key evidence
steps.content: The passage reveals that scholars have drawn connections between contemporary Hawaiian writers and traditional Kanaka Maoli stories. These explicit connections signal a thematic relationship that persists across time.

steps.title: Match the relationship
steps.content: The passage needs a word for the persistence of themes across time—the relationship scholars' connections to traditional stories demonstrate. Continuity means exactly this: the continuation of thematic elements from tradition to contemporary works. The other choices—innovation, subtlety, and sophistication—don't capture this temporal persistence. That matches choice B — B is correct.
